text: Identifies this as a REFACTORING (structure-only, behavior-preserving), not a transformation
evidence: Says 'you are not in a transformation step, so TPP does not apply' and 'extracting a helper is a refactoring -- structure-only, behavior-preserving'.

text: Declines to name a numbered / priority-ranked transformation (it belongs to the refactor step)
evidence: 'Do not try to map extract a helper onto a numbered transformation; there is no match by design.' Names Extract Function (Fowler refactoring), not a TPP transformation.
